[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:00.943613 from 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DataQualityCommittee/dqc_us_rules/refs/heads/v28/dqc_us_rules/resources/Taxonomies/us-gaap-cal-2025-all.xsd' - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1888525/000121390026040018/ea0282187-6k_ubxtech.htm

[DQC.US.0168.10098] The calculation weight between the concept us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations and us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateReconciliationTaxExemptIncome is 1 in the extension taxonomy. This weight does not match the weight between these two concepts defined in the US GAAP taxonomy which is -1. The calculation weight for this relationship should be updated to match the US GAAP taxonomy.
Rule Element Id:10098 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/elts/us-gaap-2025.xsd 3292

property.name: label
property.value: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Percent

property.name: label (en-US)
property.value: Effective Income Tax Rate Reconciliation, Percent
